Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looks like Sanada's room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 5 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Ugh, dammit... I still can't stop thinking about what happened in Yakushima...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 5 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}You're telling me I can't carry a conversation any better than Junpei?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 5 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}How can I be on the same level as that idiot and his lame pickup lines?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}"Are you able to make others laugh with a well-timed joke?"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 5 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 3 25 25}Well... No specific examples come to mind, but I think I at least do that much.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}"Careful: Making others laugh and being laughed at are two entirely different things!"[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}"When people speak to you, do you tend to respond with pure logic and reason?"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}"This is a common mistake among inarticulate men. Try to consider what the other party is feeling first."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 5 5 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Dammit. I guess they've got a point...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}"Try practicing by imagining you're asking a female friend or colleague to your favorite store."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}"Remember, it's important to smile and have a sense of humor!"[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 5 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Um... H-Hey there! Uh... What great timing to see you here! Nice one![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 5 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I'm going to Umiushi, wanna come with?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 5 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 3 25 25}Y-Y'know, the beef bowl place... H-Hey... M-Maybe we could "meat" up there... Get it!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The recording ends here...[n]{f 1 1}
